No Airflow account is required — the attack surface is any deployment downloading directories from an untrusted SFTP server. Upgrade `apache-airflow-providers-sftp` to 5.8.1 or later.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00626, "percentile": 0.45547}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qf38-jq28-3ccq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:35:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf38-jq28-3ccq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qf38-jq28-3ccq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50203"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T13:20:47Z", "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:35:51Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50203", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/67985", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/7f4b284oh44c1n95oq8mh1qc7y1lr9dx", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/06/16/3", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow-providers-sftp/PYSEC-2026-218.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf38-jq28-3ccq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow SFTP provider: Path traversal in SFTPHook.retrieve_directory", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T21:07:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf38-jq28-3ccq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow-providers-sftp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow SFTP provider: Path traversal in SFTPHook.retrieve_directory
